#### [Hexalith\.EventStore\.Contracts](index.md 'index')
### [Hexalith\.EventStore\.Contracts\.Aggregates](Hexalith.EventStore.Contracts.Aggregates.md 'Hexalith\.EventStore\.Contracts\.Aggregates')

## ITerminatable Interface

Opt\-in interface for aggregate states that support tombstoning \(FR66\)\.
When [IsTerminated](Hexalith.EventStore.Contracts.Aggregates.ITerminatable.md#Hexalith.EventStore.Contracts.Aggregates.ITerminatable.IsTerminated 'Hexalith\.EventStore\.Contracts\.Aggregates\.ITerminatable\.IsTerminated') is `true`, `EventStoreAggregate.ProcessAsync`
rejects all subsequent commands with an `AggregateTerminated` rejection event\.

```csharp
public interface ITerminatable
```

### Remarks
States implementing this interface MUST also provide a no\-op `Apply(AggregateTerminated)` method,
because the framework persists `AggregateTerminated` rejection events to the event stream
and rehydration replays all events\.
### Properties

<a name='Hexalith.EventStore.Contracts.Aggregates.ITerminatable.IsTerminated'></a>

## ITerminatable\.IsTerminated Property

Gets a value indicating whether this aggregate has been permanently terminated\.

```csharp
bool IsTerminated { get; }
```
